name: default
description: Popover anchored to a button-styled trigger showing contextual account settings. Popover.Trigger renders the button itself; the trigger slot's child is the trigger's inline content.

props.children: Manage your account preferences, notifications, and privacy options.

name: user-menu
description: Popover used as a user menu with icon-only trigger and rich content panel. Trigger slot holds an icon rendered inside Popover.Trigger's button.
